subgoals.description: Research and compile a list of 3-5 Edinburgh venues with basic details
subgoals.success_criterion: List of venues with name, location, capacity, and price range is available

subgoals.description: Gather detailed information about the top venue including amenities and contact details
subgoals.success_criterion: Detailed venue data including photos, amenities, and contact info is collected

subgoals.description: Create a promotional flyer using the selected venue's details
subgoals.success_criterion: Flyer draft is generated with venue information and event description
